interfaces.name: getHomepageFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured content for the homepage including popular recipes, recent wellbeing articles, and highlighted activities.

interfaces.name: listRecipes
interfaces.description: List recipes with filters and sorting for the Recipes page and Planner Recipes tab.

parameters.name: mealType
parameters.description: Filter by meal type, e.g., 'breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snacks'.

parameters.name: maxCookTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum cook time in minutes, e.g., 45.

parameters.name: maxPrepTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum prep time in minutes.

parameters.name: maxTotalTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum total time in minutes.

parameters.name: maxCaloriesPerServing
parameters.description: Maximum calories per serving, e.g., 600.

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Minimum average rating, e.g., 4.0.

parameters.name: servings
parameters.description: Exact number of servings required, e.g., 4.

parameters.name: healthTag
parameters.description: Optional health tag filter, e.g., 'low_calorie', 'low_sugar', 'high_protein'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'rating_desc', 'newest', 'cook_time_asc', 'calories_asc'.

interfaces.name: getRecipeFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and friendly labels for the Recipes page filters.

interfaces.name: getRecipeDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a recipe, including ingredients, steps, and related recipes.

parameters.name: recipeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the recipe, typically from the selected recipe card or URL.

interfaces.name: getRecipeCollectionsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all recipe collections for the current user with item counts, for selection dialogs and Saved Lists page.

interfaces.name: getRecipeCollectionDetail
interfaces.description: Get a specific recipe collection with all its saved recipes for review or editing.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the recipe collection to display.

interfaces.name: saveRecipeToCollection
interfaces.description: Save a recipe into a recipe collection. Creates a new collection when only a collection name is provided.

parameters.name: recipeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the recipe to save.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Existing collection to save into. If omitted, collectionName will be used to create or reuse a collection.

parameters.name: collectionName
parameters.description: Name of the collection to create or use, e.g., 'weeknight dinners'. Required if collectionId is not provided.

interfaces.name: listActivities
interfaces.description: List activities with filters and sorting for the Activities page and Planner Activities tab.

parameters.name: ageGroup
parameters.description: Filter by age group, e.g., 'years_3_6', 'years_5_8', 'years_9_12', 'all_ages'.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Filter by location, e.g., 'indoors', 'outdoors', 'mixed'.

parameters.name: costType
parameters.description: Filter by cost type, e.g., 'free', 'low_cost', 'paid', 'variable'.

parameters.name: maxDurationMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum duration in minutes, e.g., 60.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Optional tags to filter by, e.g., 'craft', 'movement', 'mindfulness'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'relevance', 'duration_asc', 'newest'.

interfaces.name: getActivityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and friendly labels for the Activities page filters.

interfaces.name: getActivityDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for an activity, including materials, instructions, and related activities.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: Identifier of the activity, typically from the selected activity card or URL.

interfaces.name: getActivityListsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all activity lists for the current user with item counts, for selection dialogs and Saved Lists page.

interfaces.name: getActivityListDetail
interfaces.description: Get a specific activity list with all its saved activities for review or editing.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Identifier of the activity list to display.

interfaces.name: saveActivityToList
interfaces.description: Save an activity into an activity list. Creates a new list when only a list name is provided.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: Identifier of the activity to save.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Existing list to save into. If omitted, listName will be used to create or reuse a list.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Name of the list to create or use, e.g., 'rainy day plan'. Required if listId is not provided.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search articles with keyword and filters for the Search & Articles page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords, e.g., 'family mindfulness routine', 'screen time rules'.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Article category filter, e.g., 'wellbeing', 'parenting', 'recipes', 'activities'.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Article level filter, e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'all_levels'.

parameters.name: minPublishDate
parameters.description: Minimum publish date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: maxPublishDate
parameters.description: Maximum publish date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: ageGroup
parameters.description: Optional age group filter, e.g., 'years_9_12', 'parents_only', 'all_ages'.

parameters.name: minSessionLengthMinutes
parameters.description: Minimum session length in minutes.

parameters.name: maxSessionLengthMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum session length in minutes, e.g., 15.

parameters.name: minCommentCount
parameters.description: Minimum number of comments, e.g., 10.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'relevance', 'newest', 'comment_count_desc'.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for an article, including content and metadata.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the article, typically from the selected article card or URL.

interfaces.name: getArticleComments
interfaces.description: Get approved comments for an article, along with the total count.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the article.

interfaces.name: addCommentToArticle
interfaces.description: Submit a new comment on an article.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the article to comment on.

parameters.name: authorName
parameters.description: Display name to show with the comment.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Comment text. The UI can enforce constraints such as exactly two sentences including a phrase like 'family agreement'.

interfaces.name: getReadingListsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists for the current user with item counts.

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetail
interfaces.description: Get a specific reading list with all its saved articles for review or editing.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: Identifier of the reading list to display.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Bookmark an article into a reading list. Uses a default reading list if no list is specified.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the article to bookmark.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: Existing reading list to save into. If omitted, readingListName is used or a default reading list is used/created.

parameters.name: readingListName
parameters.description: Name of the reading list to create or use, e.g., 'reading list'. If omitted and readingListId is not provided, a default list is used.

interfaces.name: getShopCategories
interfaces.description: Get available product categories for the Shop page navigation.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products in a given category with search, filters, and sorting for the Shop page.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Product category, e.g., 'fitness_and_yoga', 'toys', 'books'.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Category-level search text, e.g., 'family yoga mat'.

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: Minimum price filter.

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: Maximum price filter, e.g., 60.

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Minimum average rating, e.g., 4.5.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Optional tags to filter by, e.g., 'family_yoga_mat'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'relevance', 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'rating_desc'.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and friendly labels for the Shop page filters.

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a product, including price, rating, and related products.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product, typically from the selected product card or URL.

interfaces.name: getProductListsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all product lists for the current user with item counts.

interfaces.name: getProductListDetail
interfaces.description: Get a specific product list with all its saved products for review or editing.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product list to display.

interfaces.name: saveProductToList
interfaces.description: Save a product into a product list. Creates a new list when only a list name is provided.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product to save.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Existing product list to save into. If omitted, listName will be used to create or reuse a list.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Name of the list to create or use, e.g., 'home gym'. Required if listId is not provided.

interfaces.name: createPlannerPlan
interfaces.description: Create a new planner plan, e.g., 'Weekend Fun'.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the plan, e.g., 'weekend fun'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of the plan.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Optional start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Optional end date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: getPlannerPlansOverview
interfaces.description: Get all planner plans for the current user with basic stats for selection.

interfaces.name: getPlannerPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific planner plan, including all items.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Identifier of the planner plan to open.

interfaces.name: addItemToPlannerPlan
interfaces.description: Add an activity or recipe to a planner plan on a specific day.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Identifier of the planner plan to add to.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.description: Type of item being added, 'activity' or 'recipe'.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: Activity identifier when itemType is 'activity'. Can be provided from an Activities tab or Activity Detail page.

parameters.name: recipeId
parameters.description: Recipe identifier when itemType is 'recipe'. Can be provided from a Recipes tab or Recipe Detail page.

parameters.name: dayOfWeek
parameters.description: Day of week to schedule, e.g., 'saturday', 'sunday'.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes for this plan item.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromPlannerPlan
interfaces.description: Remove an item from a planner plan.

parameters.name: planItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the planner plan item to remove.

interfaces.name: getPlannerPlanSchedule
interfaces.description: Get a schedule view of a planner plan, grouping items by day of week with resolved activity or recipe details.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Identifier of the planner plan to summarize.

interfaces.name: getToolsOverview
interfaces.description: Get a list of available tools for the Tools page, including recommended tools.

interfaces.name: getWellnessBudgetForMonth
interfaces.description: Get the wellness budget and categories for a given month and year, if it exists.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month key, e.g., 'january', 'february', 'march'.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Four-digit year, e.g., 2026.

budget.description: Existing budget for the month, or may be null if none is configured.

interfaces.name: saveWellnessBudget
interfaces.description: Create or update the wellness budget for a given month and year with category allocations.

parameters.name: totalAmount
parameters.description: Total monthly wellness budget amount, e.g., 200.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month key, e.g., 'april'.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Four-digit year, e.g., 2026.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes for this budget configuration.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterPreferences
interfaces.description: Get the current newsletter preferences for the single user.

interfaces.name: updateNewsletterPreferences
interfaces.description: Set newsletter topics and delivery schedule for the single user.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Delivery frequency, e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'none'.

parameters.name: dayOfWeek
parameters.description: Preferred day of week, e.g., 'monday'. Required when frequency is 'weekly'.

parameters.name: timeOfDay
parameters.description: Preferred delivery time in 'HH:MM' format, e.g., '08:00'.

parameters.name: topics
parameters.description: Selected topics, e.g., 'healthy_recipes', 'parenting_tips', 'mindfulness_and_self_care', 'fitness_and_yoga', 'budgeting_and_finances', 'screen_time_and_technology'.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address for newsletter delivery.

interfaces.name: getSavedListsAndCollectionsOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of all saved recipe collections, activity lists, product lists, and reading lists with item counts for the Saved Lists & Collections page.

interfaces.name: createSavedListOrCollection
interfaces.description: Create an empty saved list or collection from the Saved Lists & Collections page.

parameters.name: listType
parameters.description: Type of list to create, e.g., 'recipe_collection', 'activity_list', 'product_list', 'reading_list'.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the new list or collection.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of the list or collection.

interfaces.name: renameSavedListOrCollection
interfaces.description: Rename a saved recipe collection, activity list, product list, or reading list.

parameters.name: listType
parameters.description: Type of list, e.g., 'recipe_collection', 'activity_list', 'product_list', 'reading_list'.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Identifier of the list to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New name for the list or collection.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedListOrCollection
interfaces.description: Delete a saved recipe collection, activity list, product list, or reading list and all its items.

parameters.name: listType
parameters.description: Type of list, e.g., 'recipe_collection', 'activity_list', 'product_list', 'reading_list'.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Identifier of the list to delete.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromSavedListOrCollection
interfaces.description: Remove a single saved item from a recipe collection, activity list, product list, or reading list.

parameters.name: listType
parameters.description: Type of parent list, e.g., 'recipe_collection', 'activity_list', 'product_list', 'reading_list'.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Identifier of the parent list.

parameters.name: savedItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the membership item to remove (e.g., recipe_collection_item id, activity_list_item id).

interfaces.name: getStaticPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static content for pages like About, Contact, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use.

parameters.name: pageKey
parameters.description: Static page key, e.g., 'about', 'contact', 'privacy_policy', 'terms_of_use'.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a contact message from the Contact page.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the person submitting the form.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contact email address.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Optional subject line.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message body.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Optional topic classification, e.g., 'general_feedback', 'content_suggestion', 'technical_issue', 'other'.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateRecipeCollectionByIdOrName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve a RecipeCollection from collectionId or collectionName, creating it if needed for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActivityListByIdOrName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve an ActivityList from listId or listName, creating it if needed.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProductListByIdOrName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve a ProductList from listId or listName, creating it if needed.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingListByIdOrName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve a ReadingList from readingListId or readingListName, creating it if needed.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWellnessBudgetForMonth
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize a WellnessBudget and its categories for a given month and year.

helperFunctions.name: _persistSingleUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist all single-user state (lists, plans, budgets, preferences) to storage without requiring user identifiers.
